actNotes.notes:
Make the notes as wide as this line------------------------
Enemy at the Gate:  Rolling Magma, BUY Ele Prolif
Breaking Some Eggs: Shield Charge, Holy Flame Totem, 
                      BUY Flame Wall, Frostblink
Mercy mission:      Quicksilver, Arcane Surge, BUY Summon
                        Phantasm, Infused Channeling
Caged Brute:        Added Fire, Clarity, BUY Combustion
Siren's Cadence:    -
Trials: The Lower Prison

Save up Essence of Anger, Wrath, Hatred for Lvl40 KF Swap

Iron Ring + Blue Gem = Sapphire Ring
Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 12 for 15% MS

Lvl 4 Hailrake, 8-10 Brutus, 12-13 Merveil

Great White Beast:  Quicksilver
Intruders in Black: Herald of Ash, BUY Herald of Thunder
Sharp and Cruel:    Faster Casting, BUY Elemental Focus
                       Level Elemental Focus in Weapon Swap
Bandits:            Alira 15% Res
Trials: Crypt, Chamber of Sins 2

Save up Essence of Anger, Wrath, Hatred for Lvl40 KF Swap

CRAFT BENCH dex/str stats + flat fire damage

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 24 for 20% Movespeed
iLvl 25 for 4-socket

Lvl 14-15 Fidelitas, 16 Weaver, 20-22 Vaal Oversoul

Lost in Love:         Elemental Weakness
Sever the Right Hand: Firestorm
Fixture of Fate:      Siosa (Vendor with ALL Gems)
Trials: Crematorium, Catacombs, Imperial Gardens

Save up Essence of Anger, Wrath, Hatred for Lvl40 KF Swap

Siosa gems cost 1 Chance 3 Alteration 3 Transmute, buy:
Kinetic Fusillade, Ballista Totem, Less Duration, Wrath,
Faster Attacks, Frenzy, Haste
Level up any gems you don't immediately use in offhand for
Level 40 KF Swap

Do Labyrinth around level 32, Pursuit of Faith

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 24 for 20% Movespeed 
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed 
iLvl 25 for 4-socket (vendors sell at player level 24)

Lvl 24 Enter Docks, 27 Piety, 28 Dominus

Breaking The Seal:  Tornado
Eternal Nightmare:  Arcanist Brand, 
  OPTIONAL BUY Greater Volley - only needed at Level 40 

Save up Essence of Anger, Wrath, Hatred for Lvl40 KF Swap

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed

Lvl 30-31 Dried Lake, 31 Normal Lab, 34-35 Malachai

There may be 5-link in a Breach in Slave Pens

Save up Essence of Anger, Wrath, Hatred for Lvl40 KF Swap

By Level 40 make the swap to Kinetic Fusillade, requires:
BRRG 4 Link    - Chrome is ~1/9, or gamble Str/Int Gloves
Greater Volley - Act 4 Vendor, 1 Alchemy
Precision      - Act 1 Nessa, 1 Transmute
Decent Wand    - Blasting Wand w/ Essence/Alch or Trade

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed
Lvl 44 for 30% Movespeed
iLvl 35 for 5-links (rare!)

Lvl 40-42 Leave Chambers

Trials: The Prison

There may be 5-link in a Breach in The Strand

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty
5 levels under zone at player level 32-48

Trials: The Crypt, The Chamber of Sins

Second Lab is Ritual of Awakening

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty
5 levels under zone at player level 32-48
6 levels under zone at player level 48-62

Trials: Bath House

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Lvl 54 Finish Act 8 (Harbour Bridge is last zone)

Trials: The Tunnel

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Lvl 54 Enter BA
Leave at: 58 if strong, 60 if average, 62 if weak

Trials: The Ossuary

Third Lab is Conviction of Power

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling for gear can give 4-links, ideally gamble gloves
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty (6-7 under zone)
